title: Thumping win cements Canada's place as a 'soccer nation'
description: Despite Ismaël Koné’s injury, the 6-0 thrashing of Qatar has put Canada fans in dreamland.
content:
Canada fans would have been happy with a modest win over Qatar on Thursday. Instead, they got a historic 6-0 rout - a victory they say has cemented Canada's place as a "soccer nation".
The match will go down in Canadian sports history as their first-... [3492 chars]

title: Israel and Hezbollah agree ceasefire, US says, as more Lebanon strikes reported
description: The agreement followed concerns that continued clashes would undermine the deal to end the war between the US and Iran.
content:
Israel and Hezbollah have agreed a ceasefire, a US official says, following intense Israeli air strikes in southern Lebanon that killed 47 people.
The latest agreement followed concerns that continued clashes, which also saw Hezbollah kill four Israe... [4518 chars]

title: PM under pressure from Labour MPs and ministers to set timetable for exit
description: The BBC has been told that the transport secretary is among those advising Starmer to set out a timetable.
content:
Sir Keir Starmer is facing calls to set a timetable for his departure from Downing Street after Andy Burnham won a resounding victory in the Makerfield by-election, paving the way for a leadership challenge.
A growing number of Labour MPs are urging ... [5748 chars]

title: Number of pregnant smokers in Humber and North Yorkshire drops
description: Fewer pregnant women across the Humber and North Yorkshire are smoking, according to NHS data.
content:
The amount of people smoking while pregnant has reached a record low, according to NHS data.
New statistics show 4.7% of women across Hull, East Yorkshire, North Yorkshire and North Lincolnshire were smoking at the time of delivery in 2025/2026, down... [2387 chars]

title: Boy, 4, abducted from Cradley Heath park and found in woodland
description: The boy went missing for several minutes while his mum tended to a baby, say police.
